<!--
  Mental release-notes template.
  Replace {VERSION} everywhere. Delete any section that has no entries (keep at least the headline bullets under Changes).
  Images use absolute raw URLs — relative paths do not resolve on release pages.
  Voice: benefit first, one idea per bullet, no hype words, ⌖ is the only ornament.
-->

<p align="center">
  <picture>
    <source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/owengregson/Mental/main/assets/release/banner-dark.svg">
    <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/owengregson/Mental/main/assets/release/banner.svg" width="860" alt="Mental — release">
  </picture>
</p>

<p align="center">
  <code>⌖ Paper 1.9.4 → 26.x</code>
  <code>⌖ Folia</code>
  <code>⌖ Java 8+</code>
  <code>⌖ zero dependencies</code>
</p>

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/owengregson/Mental/main/assets/release/headers/changes.svg" height="42" alt="Changes">
</p>

- **Bold noun-phrase.** One packed sentence on what changed and why a server owner cares.
- **Second highlight.** Keep it to the headline items — details go in the changelog below.

<details>
<summary><b>Full changelog</b> — click to expand</summary>
<br>

- One change per bullet, benefit first, mechanism second.
- Reference config keys as `inline code` and docs as links.

</details>

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/owengregson/Mental/main/assets/release/headers/fixes.svg" height="42" alt="Fixes">
</p>

- **Fixed:** what was broken, in player/owner language.
